# CWE-917 vulnerable: user-controlled template expression
lang: go
file: CWE-917-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

// CWE-917: Expression Language Injection via text/template built from request input.
// Vulnerable: template body concatenates client-supplied filter expression.

import (
	"bytes"
	"net/http"
	"text/template"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func RenderReport() gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		title := c.Query("title")
		expr := c.Query("filter")
		src := "{{.Title}} where " + expr
		tmpl, err := template.New("report").Parse(src)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		var buf bytes.Buffer
		data := map[string]string{"Title": title}
		if err := tmpl.Execute(&buf, data); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.String(http.StatusOK, buf.String())
	}
}
